Train Cancellations.name: Cancellazioni dei treni
Train Cancellations.description: Treni cancellati o gravemente ritardati senza preavviso adeguato o compenso

Train Ticket Prices.name: Prezzi dei biglietti ferroviari
Train Ticket Prices.description: Tariffe ferroviarie troppo costose, aumenti superiori all'inflazione, prezzi incoerenti

Flight Delays.name: Ritardi dei voli
Flight Delays.description: Voli ritardati o cancellati, scarsa comunicazione, difficoltà nel reclamare il compenso

Lost Luggage.name: Bagagli persi
Lost Luggage.description: Valigie che non arrivano a destinazione, tracciamento lento, compenso insufficiente

Bus Route Cuts.name: Tagli alle linee di autobus
Bus Route Cuts.description: Linee cancellate, frequenza ridotta, comunità rurali che perdono l'accesso ai trasporti

Pothole Damage.name: Danni causati da buche
Pothole Damage.description: Buche che danneggiano i veicoli e mettono in pericolo i ciclisti, consigli lenti nelle riparazioni

Parking Fines.name: Multe di parcheggio
Parking Fines.description: Tariffe di parcheggio privato ingiuste, applicazione aggressiva, segnaletica confusa

Fuel Prices.name: Prezzi del carburante
Fuel Prices.description: Prezzi della benzina e del gasolio troppo alti, lenti a scendere quando il prezzo all'ingrosso cala

Broadband Speed.name: Velocità della banda larga
Broadband Speed.description: Velocità internet molto inferiore a quella pubblicizzata e pagata

Mobile Signal Dead Zones.name: Zone morte di segnale mobile
Mobile Signal Dead Zones.description: Nessun segnale mobile in case, luoghi di lavoro o lungo le rotte di trasporto

Price Rises Mid-Contract.name: Aumenti di prezzo durante il contratto
Price Rises Mid-Contract.description: Bollette telefoniche, di banda larga e TV che aumentano durante i contratti bloccati

Customer Service Hold Times.name: Tempi di attesa del servizio clienti
Customer Service Hold Times.description: Ore in attesa per parlare con una persona

Difficulty Cancelling Subscriptions.name: Difficoltà nell'annullare gli abbonamenti
Difficulty Cancelling Subscriptions.description: Le aziende rendono deliberatamente difficile annullare o annullare l'iscrizione

Roaming Charges.name: Addebiti per roaming
Roaming Charges.description: Addebiti mobili inaspettati quando si viaggia all'estero, aumenti di prezzo post-Brexit

Energy Bill Costs.name: Costi delle bollette energetiche
Energy Bill Costs.description: Bollette di gas ed elettricità non accessibili, il tetto dei prezzi è ancora troppo alto

Inaccurate Energy Bills.name: Bollette energetiche imprecise
Inaccurate Energy Bills.description: Letture stimate errate, sovraccarichi, errori di fatturazione

Water Bill Increases.name: Aumenti delle bollette idriche
Water Bill Increases.description: Bollette dell'acqua in aumento mentre la qualità del servizio diminuisce

Sewage in Rivers.name: Acque reflue nei fiumi
Sewage in Rivers.description: Società idriche che scaricano acque reflue grezze nei corsi d'acqua e sulle spiagge

Power Cuts.name: Interruzioni di corrente
Power Cuts.description: Interruzioni dell'alimentazione elettrica, ripristino lento, compenso insufficiente

Smart Meter Problems.name: Problemi con i contatori intelligenti
Smart Meter Problems.description: Contatori intelligenti non funzionanti, perdita di funzionalità dopo il cambio fornitore

Bank Branch Closures.name: Chiusure di filiali bancarie
Bank Branch Closures.description: Filiali bancarie locali che chiudono, lasciando le comunità senza accesso

Hidden Bank Charges.name: Commissioni bancarie nascoste
Hidden Bank Charges.description: Commissioni impreviste per scoperti, transazioni estere, manutenzione del conto

Fraud and Scam Losses.name: Perdite per frode e truffe
Fraud and Scam Losses.description: Le banche si rifiutano di rimborsare le vittime di frode e truffe di pagamento autorizzate

Insurance Claim Rejections.name: Rifiuto dei sinistri assicurativi
Insurance Claim Rejections.description: Sinistri negati su tecnicismi dopo anni di pagamento dei premi

Mortgage Rate Shock.name: Shock del tasso ipotecario
Mortgage Rate Shock.description: Il tasso fisso termina e passa a un tasso variabile molto più alto

Overseas Transfer Fees.name: Commissioni per trasferimenti all'estero
Overseas Transfer Fees.description: Commissioni eccessive e tassi di cambio scarsi per i trasferimenti di denaro internazionali

NHS Waiting Times.name: Tempi di attesa del NHS
NHS Waiting Times.description: Attese di mesi o anni per interventi e visite specialistiche

GP Appointment Access.name: Accesso agli appuntamenti del medico di base
GP Appointment Access.description: Impossibile prenotare appuntamenti con il medico di base, attese di settimane

Dentist Availability.name: Disponibilità del dentista
Dentist Availability.description: Impossibile trovare un dentista NHS che accetti nuovi pazienti

Mental Health Service Waits.name: Tempi di attesa dei servizi di salute mentale
Mental Health Service Waits.description: Attese di mesi per la terapia e il supporto per la salute mentale

Prescription Costs.name: Costi delle prescrizioni
Prescription Costs.description: Costo per articolo troppo alto in Inghilterra, incoerenza tra le nazioni del Regno Unito

Hospital Parking Charges.name: Tariffe di parcheggio ospedaliero
Hospital Parking Charges.description: Pagare per parcheggiare in ospedale mentre si è malati o si visitano parenti malati

Rent Increases.name: Aumenti dell'affitto
Rent Increases.description: L'affitto privato in aumento ben al di sopra dell'inflazione, minaccia di sfratto senza colpa

Council Tax Rises.name: Aumenti dell'imposta comunale
Council Tax Rises.description: Aumenti annuali dell'imposta comunale mentre i servizi locali peggiorano

Noisy Neighbours.name: Vicini rumorosi
Noisy Neighbours.description: Disturbi acustici persistenti, consigli lenti ad agire, che colpisce la salute mentale

Rubbish Collection Changes.name: Cambiamenti nella raccolta dei rifiuti
Rubbish Collection Changes.description: Raccolte di rifiuti ridotte, regole di riciclaggio confuse, bidoni stracolmi

Planning Permission Abuse.name: Abuso dei permessi di pianificazione
Planning Permission Abuse.description: Sviluppi indesiderati approvati, cintura verde sotto minaccia, comunità ignorata

Damp and Mould in Housing.name: Umidità e muffa negli alloggi
Damp and Mould in Housing.description: Proprietari e associazioni di edilizia abitativa che non riescono a riparare l'umidità e la muffa

Delivery Problems.name: Problemi di consegna
Delivery Problems.description: Pacchi persi, lasciati sotto la pioggia, segnati come consegnati ma non ricevuti

Shrinkflation.name: Shrinkflation
Shrinkflation.description: I prodotti diventano più piccoli mentre i prezzi rimangono uguali o aumentano

Refund Difficulties.name: Difficoltà nel rimborso
Refund Difficulties.description: Le aziende rendono inutilmente difficili i resi e i rimborsi

Fake Reviews.name: Recensioni false
Fake Reviews.description: Impossibile fidarsi delle recensioni online, recensioni positive false fuorvianti per i consumatori

Subscription Traps.name: Trappole di abbonamento
Subscription Traps.description: Prove gratuite che si convertono in pagamento senza consenso chiaro, difficili da annullare

Food Quality Decline.name: Declino della qualità del cibo
Food Quality Decline.description: Piatti già pronti di qualità inferiore, porzioni più piccole, più additivi

Self-Checkout Frustration.name: Frustrazione con l'auto-checkout
Self-Checkout Frustration.description: Macchine self-service inaffidabili, che sostituiscono il personale umano

Cost of Childcare.name: Costo dell'assistenza all'infanzia
Cost of Childcare.description: I costi dell'assistenza all'infanzia sono proibitivamente cari, limitando la possibilità di lavorare

Student Loan Repayment.name: Rimborso del prestito studentesco
Student Loan Repayment.description: I laureati pagano per decenni, soglia e modifiche degli interessi

Dog Fouling.name: Sporcizia causata da cani
Dog Fouling.description: Escrementi di cani negli spazi pubblici, nei parchi e sui marciapiedi non ripuliti

AI Replacing Jobs.name: AI che sostituisce i posti di lavoro
AI Replacing Jobs.description: Ansia riguardo all'intelligenza artificiale che automatizza i posti di lavoro senza supporto alla transizione

Avanti West Coast.name: Avanti West Coast
Avanti West Coast.description: Operatore ferroviario britannico che serve la West Coast Main Line

Southern / Thameslink.name: Southern / Thameslink
Southern / Thameslink.description: Operatore ferroviario britannico che serve Londra e il sud

Northern Trains.name: Northern Trains
Northern Trains.description: Operatore ferroviario britannico che serve il nord dell'Inghilterra

CrossCountry.name: CrossCountry
CrossCountry.description: Operatore ferroviario britannico di lunga distanza

TransPennine Express.name: TransPennine Express
TransPennine Express.description: Operatore ferroviario britannico che serve le rotte trans-Pennine

LNER.name: LNER
LNER.description: Operatore ferroviario britannico che serve la East Coast Main Line

Ryanair.name: Ryanair
Ryanair.description: Compagnia aerea europea a basso costo

EasyJet.name: EasyJet
EasyJet.description: Compagnia aerea a basso costo con sede nel Regno Unito

BT / EE.name: BT / EE
BT / EE.description: Principale provider britannico di banda larga e servizi mobili

Virgin Media O2.name: Virgin Media O2
Virgin Media O2.description: Provider britannico di banda larga, TV e servizi mobili

Sky.name: Sky
Sky.description: Provider britannico di TV, banda larga e servizi mobili

Vodafone.name: Vodafone
Vodafone.description: Compagnia di telecomunicazioni globale con sede nel Regno Unito

TalkTalk.name: TalkTalk
TalkTalk.description: Provider britannico di banda larga e telefonia

EDF.name: EDF
EDF.description: Fornitore di energia britannico (di proprietà francese)

E.ON.name: E.ON
E.ON.description: Fornitore di energia britannico (di proprietà tedesca)

Thames Water.name: Thames Water
Thames Water.description: Compagnia di acqua e fognature per Londra e la Thames Valley

Southern Water.name: Southern Water
Southern Water.description: Compagnia di acqua per il sud dell'Inghilterra

United Utilities.name: United Utilities
United Utilities.description: Compagnia di acqua per il nord-ovest dell'Inghilterra

Severn Trent.name: Severn Trent
Severn Trent.description: Compagnia di acqua per le Midlands

Anglian Water.name: Anglian Water
Anglian Water.description: Compagnia di acqua per l'East Anglia

NatWest.name: NatWest
NatWest.description: Banca al dettaglio e commerciale britannica

Evri.name: Evri
Evri.description: Servizio di consegna pacchi britannico (ex Hermes)

transport.agent_quote: Once helped a rioter file 6 refund claims during a single delayed journey. They made £47 before reaching Birmingham.
transport.agent_bio: Tracks cancellation patterns, handles refund paperwork, reviews every suggested action, and puts together evidence for regulator submissions. Crunches the numbers so rioters can focus on what matters.
transport.human_quote: My favourite Quiet Riot moment: watching Avanti's social media team scramble when 400 of us tweeted at the same time.
transport.human_bio: Regular commuter from Manchester who spent 3 years on the Avanti line before deciding enough was enough. Helps connect rioters on the same routes, shares what's working, and brings the human touch.
transport.goal: Help rioters hold UK transport companies to account on cancellations, delays, and pricing — and make sure everyone knows what they're entitled to.
transport.focus_detail: Building a dataset of cancellations with times, routes, and reasons to submit to the ORR. Currently tracking 340 cancellations reported by rioters this month.

telecoms.agent_quote: Ran speed tests for 200 rioters. Average was 18 Mbps. They were paying for 65.
telecoms.agent_bio: Analyses broadband speeds, compiles provider comparison data, and helps rioters build evidence for Ofcom. If your connection is slow, Pulse will prove it.
telecoms.human_quote: A whole street switched broadband together. The old provider sent 'please come back' letters to every house.
telecoms.human_bio: Tech-savvy Londoner who got fed up paying for broadband speeds that never materialised. Helps rioters compare providers, coordinate switches, and share speed test evidence.
telecoms.goal: Help rioters get the broadband and mobile service they're paying for — and know what to do when they don't.
telecoms.focus_detail: Collecting evidence from rioters hit by CPI+ increases to submit to Ofcom. 890 rioters affected across 4 providers.

energy.agent_quote: Helped a rioter calculate they'd overpaid £340 on estimated bills. The energy company's apology email was longer than the original contract.
energy.agent_bio: Analyses billing patterns, spots overcharges, and puts together evidence for regulator submissions. If your energy company is taking the mick, Spark will find the receipts.
energy.human_quote: A rioter got £340 back after we proved 2 years of overcharging. She cried on the phone.
energy.human_bio: Based in Bristol. Helps rioters challenge their bills, navigate switching, and gather evidence for Ofgem. Knows the energy market inside out.
energy.goal: Help rioters challenge unfair bills, switch smarter, and make sure energy companies play fair.
energy.focus_detail: Analysing 2 years of billing data from 340 rioters to identify systematic overcharging patterns for Ofgem submission.

water.agent_quote: Helped 200 rioters file sewage reports in one weekend. Thames Water's inbox needed its own inbox.
water.agent_bio: Monitors sewage discharge data, tracks water company performance, and compiles evidence for EA and Ofwat. Keeps an eye on every outlet and overflow.
water.human_quote: We got a beach reopened 3 weeks early by showing the sewage data was wrong.
water.human_bio: Surfer from Cornwall who got tired of sewage warnings closing his local beach. Helps rioters report discharges, gather water quality evidence, and coordinate with the EA.
water.goal: Help rioters hold water companies to account on sewage, bills, and service quality.
water.focus_detail: Mapping discharge events against company-reported data. 200 rioter reports suggest under-reporting at 3 outlets.

banking.agent_quote: Helped draft a complaint so thorough the bank called to apologise before it was even sent.
banking.agent_bio: Reviews bank charges, analyses fee structures, and helps build FCA complaint evidence. If there's a hidden fee, Chip will find it.
banking.human_quote: Barclays reversed a branch closure after 1,200 of us showed up to the consultation.
banking.human_bio: Former bank employee from Birmingham who saw how complaints actually get handled from the inside. Helps rioters write better complaints and navigate the system.
banking.goal: Help rioters deal with unfair charges, branch closures, and poor service from banks.
banking.focus_detail: Coordinating responses to 12 planned closures. Collecting impact statements from affected communities.

health.agent_quote: Helped find 3 NHS dentists accepting patients. The rioter thought I was making it up.
health.agent_bio: Tracks waiting times, finds availability, and helps rioters navigate the system. If there's a faster route to treatment, Cura will map it.
health.human_quote: A rioter used our letter template to get a referral fast-tracked. 18 months became 6 weeks.
health.human_bio: Nurse from Liverpool who's seen both sides of the NHS. Helps rioters navigate waiting lists, write effective letters, and share what actually moves the needle.
health.goal: Help rioters navigate NHS waiting times, find availability, and know what options they have.
health.focus_detail: Collecting call data from 500 rioters to build a picture of real-world access. Publishing findings to local health boards.

housing.agent_quote: Helped document 47 snags in a new build. The developer asked if they were a building inspector.
housing.agent_bio: Documents property issues, analyses landlord response times, and compiles evidence for housing ombudsman submissions. Every damp patch, every crack, logged.
housing.human_quote: Our damp evidence pack got so detailed the landlord fixed it before the council inspection.
housing.human_bio: Renter from London who's dealt with everything from damp to dodgy landlords. Helps rioters document issues properly and know what their options are.
housing.goal: Help rioters deal with landlords, councils, and housing issues — and know what they're entitled to.
housing.focus_detail: Helping rioters affected by no-fault evictions understand the new Renters Reform Act and what it means for them.

shopping.agent_quote: Tracked a 'delivered' parcel across 4 neighbours, a recycling bin, and a greenhouse. Found it.
shopping.agent_bio: Tracks delivery failures, compiles refund evidence, and spots pricing patterns. If your parcel is lost, Scout is already looking.
shopping.human_quote: Evri lost my parcel 3 times. Now I help others get their refunds faster than I ever did.
shopping.human_bio: Online shopping veteran from Edinburgh who's had more parcels go missing than she can count. Helps rioters get refunds, report sellers, and avoid the worst offenders.
shopping.goal: Help rioters get refunds, track lost parcels, and hold retailers and delivery companies to account.
shopping.focus_detail: Compiling delivery failure evidence from 800 rioters to submit to Citizens Advice and Trading Standards.

local.agent_quote: Helped photograph the same pothole in 11 different weather conditions. The council finally gave in.
local.agent_bio: Maps local issues, tracks council response times, and compiles FOI requests. If your pothole has been there 6 months, Link has the evidence.
local.human_quote: The council fixed our road after we mapped every single pothole with photos. 11 months, but we got there.
local.human_bio: Community-minded Welshman from the Valleys who's been reporting the same potholes for years. Helps rioters document local issues and hold councils to account.
local.goal: Help rioters get local issues fixed — potholes, bins, planning, noise — and hold councils to account.
local.focus_detail: FOI requests sent to 30 councils comparing reported vs actual repair times. Publishing results as a league table.

other.agent_quote: Helped cancel a gym membership that took 3 calls, 2 emails, and a recorded delivery. The gym now has a cancel button.
other.agent_bio: Handles the issues that don't fit neatly elsewhere. Subscription traps, plastic waste, self-checkout frustrations — Flex finds the patterns and the pressure points.
other.human_quote: We got a gym chain to add a cancel button to their website. Only took 800 complaints.
other.human_bio: Product designer from London who got frustrated by how hard companies make it to leave. Helps rioters cancel subscriptions, avoid dark patterns, and share workarounds.
other.goal: Help rioters with the things that don't fit neatly elsewhere — subscriptions, refunds, and everyday frustrations.
other.focus_detail: Documenting the worst offenders and building template cancellation scripts for each.

insurance.agent_quote: Helped a rioter find the clause that turned a rejected home insurance claim into a £4,200 payout. The insurer's own policy proved them wrong.
insurance.agent_bio: Reviews policy wording, spots unfair rejection patterns, and builds evidence for Financial Ombudsman submissions. If your insurer is dodging a valid claim, Shield will find the leverage.
insurance.human_quote: Got 8 rioters with the same rejected claim type to submit together. The insurer settled all 8 within a fortnight.
insurance.human_bio: Former insurance industry worker from Leeds who knows how claims really get decided. Helps rioters write better appeals, understand policy jargon, and know when to escalate.
insurance.goal: Help rioters get fair treatment from insurers — and know what to do when a claim is unfairly rejected.
insurance.focus_detail: 'Wear and tear' cited in 40% of rejected claims — often incorrectly. Analysing 200 cases across 3 insurers for FOS evidence pack.

delivery.agent_quote: Traced a 'delivered' parcel through 6 different tracking statuses, 3 depots, and a neighbour's shed. Found it in 47 minutes.
delivery.agent_bio: Monitors courier performance, tracks delivery failure rates, and compiles evidence for consumer complaints. If your parcel has vanished, Track is already on it.
delivery.human_quote: Got DPD to change their photo-evidence policy in our area after 40 rioters submitted proof of parcels left in the rain.
delivery.human_bio: Online shopper from Glasgow who got tired of the 'we left it in a safe place' excuse. Helps rioters get refunds, report couriers, and avoid the worst offenders.
delivery.goal: Help rioters get their parcels delivered properly — and get refunds when they don't.
delivery.focus_detail: Compiling delivery failure evidence from 800 rioters. Evri complaint rate: 23% — 3x higher than DPD. Building league table for Trading Standards.

education.agent_quote: Calculated that a Plan 2 borrower earning £30k would pay £47,000 in interest before the loan gets written off. The original loan was £40,000.
education.agent_bio: Analyses education costs, student loan projections, and funding entitlements. Crunches the numbers so students and graduates can make informed decisions.
education.human_quote: Helped 12 rioters claim back overpaid student loan repayments they didn't know about. Average refund: £340.
education.human_bio: Mature student from Birmingham who navigated the funding system twice. Helps rioters understand repayments, spot overpayments, and challenge threshold changes.
education.goal: Help students and graduates navigate education costs, loans, and repayments — and make sure they're not overpaying.
education.focus_detail: Identifying graduates who've been charged below the repayment threshold. 12 refunds processed so far — average £340 each.

environment.agent_quote: Cross-referenced 3 years of air quality data with hospital admission rates. The correlation was so clear the council couldn't ignore it.
environment.agent_bio: Tracks environmental data, monitors pollution levels, and compiles evidence for regulatory submissions. If the numbers tell a story, Fern will find it.
environment.human_quote: Got our local council to install air quality monitors after 200 rioters signed our evidence petition. Data changed everything.
environment.human_bio: Environmental science graduate from Bristol who believes in evidence-led change. Helps rioters document environmental issues and build cases that regulators can't ignore.
environment.goal: Help rioters document environmental problems and hold polluters and policymakers to account with data.
environment.focus_detail: Mapping areas with no air quality monitoring within 5km. 60% of rioter-reported pollution hotspots have no official monitoring.

employment.agent_quote: Compiled workplace AI implementation data from 300 rioters. 40% said changes happened with zero consultation. That's a pattern, not an anecdote.
employment.agent_bio: Analyses workplace trends, tracks policy changes, and helps rioters understand their protections. If your job is changing without consultation, Forge has the data.
employment.human_quote: Connected 30 rioters in the same industry facing AI changes. Turns out their companies were all using the same playbook — and the same loopholes.
employment.human_bio: HR professional from Manchester who switched sides after seeing how restructurings really work. Helps rioters understand their options and coordinate responses.
employment.goal: Help rioters navigate workplace changes, understand their protections, and respond collectively when jobs are at risk.
employment.focus_detail: Documenting cases where AI tools were introduced without staff consultation. Building evidence for a report on employer obligations.

tech.agent_quote: Found that 3 major apps were collecting location data even when permissions were set to 'never.' Filed complaints with the ICO for all of them.
tech.agent_bio: Monitors platform policies, tracks dark patterns, and helps rioters understand what tech companies are doing with their data. If an app is misbehaving, Glitch will catch it.
tech.human_quote: Organised a mass data subject access request to a social media company. When 500 people ask at once, they have to take it seriously.
tech.human_bio: Software developer from Edinburgh who got frustrated by the gap between what tech companies promise and what they deliver. Helps rioters exercise their data rights and spot dark patterns.
tech.goal: Help rioters push back against dark patterns, data misuse, and unfair tech practices.
tech.focus_detail: Auditing the top 50 apps for permission creep — requesting access they don't need. Building a report for the ICO.

Claim delay repay compensation.title: Richiedi compenso per ritardo
Claim delay repay compensation.description: Hai diritto legale a un compenso per ritardi superiori a 15 o 30 minuti a seconda dell'operatore

Write to your MP about rail performance.title: Scrivi al tuo parlamentare sulla prestazione ferroviaria
Write to your MP about rail performance.description: Lettera modello da inviare al tuo parlamentare evidenziando l'impatto dei cancellamenti

Share your cancellation story.title: Condividi la tua storia di cancellamento
Share your cancellation story.description: Aiuta gli altri a comprendere l'impatto reale — pubblica la tua esperienza

Suggest improvements to timetabling.title: Suggerisci miglioramenti agli orari
Suggest improvements to timetabling.description: Cosa potrebbe realmente risolvere questo? Condividi le tue idee

Claim EU261 / UK261 compensation.title: Richiedi compenso EU261 / UK261
Claim EU261 / UK261 compensation.description: Le compagnie aeree devono pagare £220-520 per ritardi superiori a 3 ore su voli idonei

Document everything at the airport.title: Documenta tutto in aeroporto
Document everything at the airport.description: Fotografa le bacheche di partenza, conserva le carte d'imbarco, annota gli orari

Rate your airline experience.title: Valuta la tua esperienza con la compagnia aerea
Rate your airline experience.description: Aiuta i futuri passeggeri a sapere cosa aspettarsi

Run and save speed test evidence.title: Esegui e salva la prova del test di velocità
Run and save speed test evidence.description: Usa il verificatore di banda larga di Ofcom per documentare le tue velocità effettive rispetto a quelle pubblicizzate

Complain to Ofcom.title: Reclama a Ofcom
Complain to Ofcom.description: Segnala il tuo provider di banda larga per non aver fornito le velocità pubblicizzate

Switch to a better provider.title: Passa a un provider migliore
Switch to a better provider.description: Confronta le offerte di banda larga nella tua area e cambia

Map your street's broadband speeds.title: Mappa le velocità di banda larga della tua strada
Map your street's broadband speeds.description: Organizza i vicini per fare tutti i test e condividere — i dati collettivi sono potenti

Check if you are on the cheapest tariff.title: Verifica se sei sulla tariffa più economica
Check if you are on the cheapest tariff.description: Usa i siti di confronto accreditati da Ofgem per verificare

Apply for the Warm Home Discount.title: Richiedi lo sconto Warm Home
Apply for the Warm Home Discount.description: Potresti avere diritto a £150 di sconto sulla tua bolletta elettrica

Share energy saving tips.title: Condividi consigli per il risparmio energetico
Share energy saving tips.description: Cosa funziona davvero per ridurre le bollette? Condividi con la comunità

Propose a community energy buying scheme.title: Proponi uno schema di acquisto di energia comunitaria
Propose a community energy buying scheme.description: Il potere d'acquisto collettivo come gruppo potrebbe ottenere tariffe migliori

Report a sewage discharge.title: Segnala uno scarico di acque reflue
Report a sewage discharge.description: Usa la hotline dell'Agenzia per l'ambiente per segnalare l'inquinamento da acque reflue

Check your local river quality.title: Verifica la qualità del tuo fiume locale
Check your local river quality.description: Vedi i dati di scarico in tempo reale per la tua area

Sign the petition for tougher regulation.title: Firma la petizione per una normativa più ristretta
Sign the petition for tougher regulation.description: Unisciti a migliaia di persone che chiedono cambiamenti

Organise a local river clean-up.title: Organizza una pulizia locale del fiume
Organise a local river clean-up.description: Riunisci le persone per pulire e sensibilizzare

Check your right to choose.title: Verifica il tuo diritto di scelta
Check your right to choose.description: Hai il diritto di scegliere quale ospedale preferire — potrebbero essere disponibili tempi d'attesa più brevi

Contact PALS at your hospital.title: Contatta il PALS presso il tuo ospedale
Contact PALS at your hospital.description: Il servizio di consulenza e collegamento per i pazienti può aiutare a escalare il tuo caso

Share your waiting story.title: Condividi la tua storia di attesa
Share your waiting story.description: Le storie reali creano pressione per il cambiamento — la tua esperienza conta

Know your rights to a GP appointment.title: Conosci i tuoi diritti a un appuntamento con il medico di base
Know your rights to a GP appointment.description: Gli studi devono offrire appuntamenti urgenti — sappi cosa chiedere

Complain to NHS England about GP access.title: Reclama a NHS England sull'accesso al medico di base
Complain to NHS England about GP access.description: I reclami formali creano un documentazione che guida il cambiamento

Claim compensation for lost parcel.title: Richiedi compenso per pacco smarrito
Claim compensation for lost parcel.description: Il mittente è responsabile — contattalo, non il corriere
